text: Last week was very busy at work.
Yesterday I finished the report.
On Monday, I started a new project.
I finished the report on Thursday.
On Wednesday, I called three clients.
My team closed a small deal on Friday.
I worked on the numbers every morning.
Everyone was happy with the result.

I worked on the numbers.
Hi, David. How was your week? Was it busy?
Yes, very busy. Last week I worked on a big report every day.
Nice. Did you finish it?
Yes, I finished it on Thursday. And I called three clients.
Great. On Friday, my team closed a deal with a new client.
That is a very good result. Congratulations!
Thank you. I did not work on the weekend. I rested at home.
Good idea. A busy week needs a calm weekend.

I finished the report yesterday.

I did not work on the weekend.
Did you finish the report?

Hi, this is David. Last week was a good week for me. On Monday, I started a new report about our sales. I worked on the numbers for two days. On Wednesday, I called some clients in London. On Friday, my team closed a big deal. I was very happy with the result. I did not work on the weekend. I rested at home. How was your week?

Good morning. This is Sarah from the finance team. Last week I was very busy. On Tuesday, I finished the budget for the new project. I checked all the numbers two times. On Thursday, I called a new client about a discount. We talked for one hour. On Friday, I started a new report, but I did not finish it. I will finish it today. Have a good day!
Last week was very busy for me. On Monday, I started a new project. On Thursday, I finished the report. On Friday, my team closed a small deal.
